subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. I’d be happy to set up an introductory call. A few slots that work on our side are:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If any of those windows work for you, send over your preferred time and I’ll confirm.

I can’t share internal contact directories or direct personal phone lines, but the public website should have the general contact points you need.

Best,
Agent
